title: ctenium villosum
intro: Ctenium villosum, also known as the hairy panic grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, offering health benefits like reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Ctenium villosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and its extracts have also been studied for their potential therapeutic applications.
